title: Meal Plans
description: Define and manage meal plan options for your guests, such as breakfast or half-board packages.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage meal plans. Please contact an administrator.

table.title: Available Meal Plans
table.description: List of all meal plans configured for your property.
table.empty_state: No meal plans have been created yet.

add_modal.title: Add New Meal Plan
add_modal.description: Set the details for the meal plan. Click save when you're done.

form.description_placeholder: e.g., Includes breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

delete_dialog.title: Are you sure?
delete_dialog.description: This will permanently delete the meal plan '{{name}}'. This action is irreversible.

permission_denied.title: Permission Denied
permission_denied.description: You are not authorized to perform this action.

validation_error.title: Validation Error
validation_error.description: Meal Plan Name and Price are required.

save_error.title: Error
save_error.description: Could not save the meal plan.

status_update_success.title: Status Updated
status_update_success.description: Meal plan '{{name}}' has been set to '{{status}}'.

status_update_error.title: Error
status_update_error.description: Could not update the meal plan status.

delete_error.title: Error
delete_error.description: Could not delete the meal plan.
